stimulus: While printing the first issues of the colony of Maryland's official gazette in the 1740s, Jonas Green—then a young Annapolis printer—took several steps to discourage forgery, such as folding sheets to create distinctive watermarks and mixing custom batches of ink to deter substitution. ______blank he stamped each issue with intricate hand-cut woodblock ornaments that were difficult for counterfeiters to reproduce.
stem: Which choice completes the text with the most logical transition?
rationale:
Choice C is the best answer. The previous sentence already gives two examples (watermarks and custom inks) of how Green deterred forgery. The new sentence adds a third example. “Moreover” signals additional supporting information.

Choices A and D introduce examples, but the prior sentence has already listed examples; the new sentence isn't a specification of the prior list but an addition. Choice B signals contrast.
